unique_indexes: idx_ledger_identity ON prospective_prediction_ledger(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index)
inline_unique_constraints: prospective_prediction_ledger UNIQUE(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index)
schema_objects.append_only_triggers: BEFORE UPDATE and BEFORE DELETE RAISE(ABORT) on prospective_activation_registry, prospective_capture_batches, prospective_prediction_ledger, prospective_capture_events, prospective_outcome_links
schema_objects.notes: prospective_capture_events is the unified append-only event stream (ACTIVATION, DEACTIVATION, CAPTURE, CAPTURE_REJECTED, AMENDMENT, INVALIDATION); it carries no foreign key so it can record rejections of attempted (rolled-back) entities.

identity_contract.ledger_id_derivation: ledger_id = 'pl_' + sha256(canonical(identity_tuple)); deterministic, caller cannot supply or override it.
identity_contract.payload_hash: sha256 over canonical(activation_id, lottery_type, target_draw, strategy_id, strategy_version, bet_index, sorted(predicted_main_numbers), predicted_second_zone, prediction_created_at_utc).

uniqueness_contract.primary_key_and_unique_index: Both the ledger PRIMARY KEY (derived ledger_id) and a UNIQUE index over the identity tuple enforce uniqueness.
uniqueness_contract.duplicate_outcome: A conflicting insert raises sqlite3.IntegrityError, the whole transaction rolls back, and a DUPLICATE_IDENTITY rejection event is appended; no second eligible row is ever created and an existing row is never overwritten.

transaction_contract.validate_and_insert_atomic: All batch validation occurs before opening the write transaction and the inserts run inside one BEGIN IMMEDIATE; the in-transaction unique key remains the authority on duplicates.

immutability_contract.enforcement: Database BEFORE UPDATE / BEFORE DELETE triggers RAISE(ABORT) on all five prospective tables.
immutability_contract.tamper_evidence: payload_hash plus the append-only event stream make any post-insert change detectable; verify_payload_hash recomputes and compares.

amendment_contract.mechanism: append_amendment writes a new AMENDMENT event referencing the original ledger_id; the original row is never updated or deleted; a post-close (effective >= draw_close) amendment is rejected; an amendment that would change any identity-tuple field is rejected as AMENDMENT_ALTERS_IDENTITY.

causality_contract.rule: prediction_created_at_utc < draw_close_at_utc - clock_skew_margin_seconds, compared as timezone-aware UTC instants (strict inequality).
causality_contract.clock_skew_rule_used: clock_skew_margin_seconds is a MANDATORY, explicit, non-negative per-draw-close-source-version configuration value supplied by the caller on DrawCloseSource. P271I freezes the rule and states the margin 'is configured per draw-close source version and never silently widened'; therefore no numeric default is invented. A missing/invalid margin fails closed (SOURCE_PROVENANCE_FAILURE).
causality_contract.boundary_behavior: Equality (prediction == close - margin) is NOT strictly earlier and is rejected as POST_CLOSE_SUBMISSION; one unit earlier is accepted.

timestamp_contract.canonical_storage: UTC ISO-8601 with explicit offset; resolution timezone Asia/Taipei is converted to UTC before comparison.

validates: freshness window when declared (stale snapshot fails closed)
draw_close_validation_contract.confirmatory_eligibility: manual is never confirmatory (MANUAL_SOURCE_NOT_CONFIRMATORY); official/deterministic are confirmatory only when manually_verified=True (PENDING / ONLY_AFTER_MANUAL_VERIFICATION), otherwise SOURCE_PENDING_MANUAL_VERIFICATION.

rejects: strings/bytes in place of a number list

power_second_zone_contract.missing_or_invalid_causes_rejection: MISSING_OR_INVALID_PREDICTED_SECOND_ZONE; the whole POWER batch is rejected (atomic).

membership_contract.only_live_pre_close_eligible: Only capture_mode=LIVE_PRE_CLOSE with an active activation, a confirmatory fresh source, and a passing causality gate is stored as an ELIGIBLE row.
membership_contract.ledger_holds_only_eligible_rows: Rejected and non-live captures are omitted from the ledger and recorded as immutable rejection events; combined with append-only triggers and the unique key, an ineligible identity can never be upgraded to prospective.

outcome_separation_contract.separate_outcome_link_table: prospective_outcome_links references ledger rows only; capture never writes it.

limitations: Isolated library only: the module is not wired into any route, scheduler, ingest, replay, scorer, adapter, registry, controlled_apply, or production path.
No production database was opened or written; the production DB SHA-256 is identical before and after the task.
No production schema migration was created or executed; the schema bootstrap targets only caller-supplied synthetic/temporary SQLite connections.
No official draw-close schedule was fetched and no official verification was claimed; source_verification_status remains MANUAL_VERIFICATION_REQUIRED.
Prospective collection is inactive; no real activation record or activation timestamp was created. register_activation only writes synthetic activations to test connections.
Tests used only sqlite3 :memory: and pytest tmp_path databases; no .db/.sqlite/WAL/SHM/journal file was created under tracked repository paths.
Passing these synthetic tests does not authorize P271K migration rehearsal, P271L deployment, P271M verification, or P271N activation, and makes no prediction-success claim.
Concurrency was exercised with two connections on a tmp_path file DB; production concurrency, locking, and busy-timeout tuning are deferred to a later authorized rehearsal.
